title: cyperus sexangularis
intro: Cyperus sexangularis, also known as the six-angled papyrus sedge, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) and is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cyperus sexangularis include reducing fever, relieving joint pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
